span.p:
RwLock<HashMap<String, Arc<RwLock<GraphState>>>>
Outer lock: graph registry
• read: concurrent graph access
• write: graph create/drop only

div.style: color: rgb(224, 224, 224) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
RwLock<GraphState> — 'graph_a'
• read: queries, searches, info
• write: node/edge mutations
